prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Lambda II RS 5.0L V8 (GDI, engine code: G8BE)** with forged internals including **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, **JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression forged slugs**, and **ARP L19 head studs** for 800+ HP reliability under forced induction. Pair with a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbo** (1.06 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegate** for precise boost control at 22 PSI on E85.

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **AEM CD-7 dash** integration, **ID1700x injectors**, and **Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger** supporting 1,200+ HP fueling. Custom **3.5-inch titanium exhaust** with **Akrapovič Racing headers** and **Burns Stainless 4-2-1 merge collectors** for optimized scavenging.

Chassis reinforcement via **Full Race Motorsports bolt-in roll cage** (FIA-spec, 4-point harness bar) and **Whiteline adjustable rear subframe bushings** to eliminate torque steer. Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valving for G90 chassis), **SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, rear trailing arms)**, and **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers** with **380mm two-piece rotors** for fade-resistant braking.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for G90’s 124.4-inch wheelbase) with **carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser** (CFRP layup by **Seibon Carbon**). Aggressive stance achieved via **Work Meister S1 3P 20x10.5 ET25 wheels** (staggered setup) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30R20)** for maximum grip.

**Vorsteiner V-FF 107 carbon fiber hood** (functional dual vents for engine bay heat extraction) paired with **Rocket Bunny rear wing (Type 2, 1,200mm span)** for downforce tuning. Full **3M Matte Military Green wrap** with **Avery Dennison Gloss Black accents** on the grille, badges, and window trim for stealth aggression.

**Interior carbon fiber overhaul** including **Recaro Pole Position seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved)**, **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and **Rolls-Royce-inspired rear console delete** (replaced with **Alcantara-wrapped storage pods** and **Bowers & Wilkins Diamond Series speakers** for audio clarity at 180+ MPH).
